_comment: stetkeep plugin hook manifest. Safety Net runs on every Edit/Write/Bash.

_notes.windows: On native Windows PowerShell (no Git Bash), replace the command with: powershell -File ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/safety-net.ps1
_notes.env: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT is injected by Claude Code and points to the plugin's installed directory.
_notes.enforcement: The hook blocks edits to paths in .craftignore/.perfignore, files marked with @craft-ignore or @perf-* annotations, and destructive Bash commands in legacy/, generated/, vendor/ paths.
